testcase.name: runScenario["User login to the site using valid credentails", "User login to the site"](1)
testcase.system-out:
@Smoke &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m User login to the site using valid credentails &amp#27;[90m# src/test/java/features/Login.feature:4&amp#27;[39m
@outline &amp#27;[1mScenario Outline:&amp#27;[22m User login to the site with multipe times &amp#27;[90m# src/test/java/features/Login.feature:16&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mUser is on login page&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.HeaderSectionStepDef.user_is_on_login_page()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mUser enters valid username and password and logged in&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.LoginStepDef.user_enters_valid_username_and_password_and_logged_in()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mUser is on login page&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.HeaderSectionStepDef.user_is_on_login_page()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mUser should redirect to the homepage as logged in&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.HeaderSectionStepDef.user_should_redirect_to_the_homepage_as_logged_in()&amp#27;[39m

SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. testcase.name: runScenario["User navigate to the order history page and validates the page heading", "User navigates to the order hsitory"](4)

testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mUser is on login page&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.HeaderSectionStepDef.user_is_on_login_page()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mUser enters valid username and password and logged in&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.LoginStepDef.user_enters_valid_username_and_password_and_logged_in()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mUser clicks the check your order link in the header&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.HeaderSectionStepDef.user_clicks_the_check_your_order_link_in_the_header()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mUser search for the product category &amp#27;[1m"Men"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.HeaderSectionStepDef.user_search_for_the_product_category(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m
